mapper.select:
select template_id, template_name, template_version, owner_type, owner_id, audit_status, status, effective_time, create_time, update_time from jst_enroll_form_template
del_flag = '0'
and template_name like concat('%', #{query.templateName}, '%')
and audit_status = #{query.auditStatus}
and status = #{query.status}
and ( (owner_type = 'platform' and audit_status = 'approved' and status = 1) or (owner_type = 'partner' and owner_id = #{partnerId}) )
order by case when owner_type = 'partner' and owner_id = #{partnerId} then 0 else 1 end asc, update_time desc, template_id desc
mapper.update: update jst_enroll_form_template set template_name = #{template.templateName}, template_version = #{template.templateVersion}, schema_json = #{template.schemaJson}, audit_status = #{template.auditStatus}, effective_time = #{template.effectiveTime}, update_by = #{template.updateBy}, update_time = #{template.updateTime} where template_id = #{template.templateId} and audit_status = #{expectedAuditStatus} and del_flag = '0'
